response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song from on-screen title: "Cyberpunk Dead Boy". 2. Searched for original artist and lyrics using "サイバーパンクデッドボーイ lyrics". 3. Confirmed composition/lyrics by Maiki P. 4. Mapped scenes to performance and post-performance talk. 5. Extracted lyrics from search results and formatted for JSON.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a musical performance of 'Cyberpunk Dead Boy' by five VTubers, followed by a birthday greeting and chat session.

scenes.description: The five VTubers perform 'Cyberpunk Dead Boy' choreographed on stage with laser lights.

I don't know what that means!

Nobody listens anyway.
Music is all about fashion.

Monkeys in the Z era also want it.
I'd like a perforated line
Anything means anything.
It doesn't matter what the lyrics are.

Come on, let's laugh together

The heavy price of velas
So what do you do? Is that all right?
My brain is idling to death.

scenes.description: The performers interact and chat with the audience, celebrating a birthday.
